subject: Natu, a small round green bird Pokemon perched on a tree branch
description: A small, round green Pokemon with a red and yellow patterned head perches on a tree branch. Its body is compact with tiny wing-nubs and it stares directly forward with large, attentive eyes. The background shows a sunny outdoor landscape with rolling green hills and what appears to be farmland or meadow in soft warm tones. The scene is cheerful and open, with clear daylight and a calm sky visible.
foreground: small round green bird Pokemon on tree branch
background: sunny outdoor landscape with hills and meadow
